revision.text:
[[ja:дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі (з§ҰйҮҺеёӮ)]][[zh:дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі]] {{Infobox ancient site | name = Futagozuka Kofun | image = [[File:Hadano-futagozuka-kofun zenkei.JPG|280px]]
Mound Panorama (Front section on the left, rear circular section at the back right) | Alternative name = | part_of = | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|Hadano, Kanagawa|en|Hadano, Kanagawa|qid=Q460806|lt=Hadano|1=Hadano, Kanagawa}} Shimo-Ootsuki 330 (Azafutago) | coordinates = {{Coord|35.359372|N|139.266783|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}| omitted = JP-14 | type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=ZenpЕҚkЕҚenfun}} | area = Mound length 46m | built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}} | burial = {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} | Interred_individual = | burial goods = Silver-decorated Keito Great Sword and numerous burial items | Historic Site = Kanagawa Prefecture Designated Historic Site "Futagozuka Kofun" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (Hadano City Designated designation1) | notes = | map=Japan Kanagawa | map_dot_label = Futagozuka Kofun | type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus-Northeast | map_dot_label = top | architectural_styles = {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=ZenpЕҚkЕҚenfun|2=ja|3=еүҚж–№еҫҢеҶҶеўі|4=ko|5=м „л°©нӣ„мӣҗл¶„|6=zh|7=еүҚж–№еҫҢең“еўі}} }} '''Futagozuka Kofun''' (дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Hadano, Kanagawa|en|Hadano, Kanagawa|qid=Q460806|lt=Hadano|1=Hadano, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It has the type of a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=ZenpЕҚkЕҚenfun}}. Designated as a historic site by Kanagawa Prefecture, its burial goods are Historic Site1 as important cultural properties by Hadano City. == Overview == Located at the tip of the Yakushihara Plateau on the left bank of the {{ill|Kinme River|ja|йҮ‘зӣ®е·қ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinme River|1=Kaname River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11647748}} overlooking the {{ill|Sagami Plain|ja|зӣёжЁЎе№ійҮҺ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sagami Plain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to зҘһеҘҲе·қзңҢ|1=Kanagawa Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q127513}}Historic Site Intypeation Board., it is the only keyhole-shaped tumulus in Hadano City. Excavations were conducted in {{ill|1970|en|1970|qid=Q2474|lt=1970|1=1970}} ({{ill|ShЕҚwa era|en|ShЕҚwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Showa era|1=ShЕҚwa era}} 45){{Sfn|Futagozuka Kofun (Heibonsha)|1984}}, and again in fiscal year {{ill|2008|en|2008|qid=Q2004|lt=2008|1=2008}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|qid=Q234510|lt=Heisei era|1=Heisei era}} 20)[http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002273/index.html Kofun built] (Hadano City Website).. The tumulus is keyhole-shaped, oriented with the front section facing northeast{{Sfn|Futagozuka Kofun (Heibonsha)|1984}}. The burial facility is a single-chambered (presumed) {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=жЁӘз©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|4=zh|5=ж©«з©ҙејҸзҹіе®Ө|6=ko|7=көҙмӢқ лҸҢл°©л¬ҙлҚӨ|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} located in the rear circular section, opening southeast, though it has been damaged over time, making detailed intypeation unclear. Numerous burial items, including a complete silver-decorated Keito Great Sword and {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}}, have been unearthed from this chamber. Based on these findings, the construction date is estimated to be in the latter half of the {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kanagawa Prefecture in {{ill|1983|en|1983|qid=Q2434|lt=1983|1=1983}} (Showa 58), and the burial goods were Historic Site1 as important cultural properties by Hadano City in {{ill|2013|en|2013|qid=Q1998|lt=2013|1=2013}} (Heisei 25). The surrounding area also includes the Shimo-Ootsuki Kakeue Ruins, Hirohata Kofun Group, and the Iwaido & Kakenoue Horizontal Hole Tomb Group. == Excavation History == * {{ill|1970|en|1970|qid=Q2474|lt=1970|1=1970}} (Showa 45), Excavation survey{{Sfn|Futagozuka Kofun (Heibonsha)|1984}}. * {{ill|1983|en|1983|qid=Q2434|lt=1983|1=1983}} (Showa 58) August 30, Designated as a Kanagawa Prefecture Historic Site. * From fiscal year {{ill|2008|en|2008|qid=Q2004|lt=2008|1=2008}} (Heisei 20), Second excavation survey. * {{ill|2013|en|2013|qid=Q1998|lt=2013|1=2013}} (Heisei 25) September 27, excavations Historic Site1 as important cultural properties by Hadano City. == Mound == The mound area are as follows[http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002233/index.html Futagozuka Kofun] (Hadano City Website).: * Total Length: 46 meters * Rear Circular Section ** Diameter: 33 meters (East-West), 26 meters (North-South) * Front Section ** Width: 25 meters == Historic Site == === Kanagawa Prefecture Designated designation1 === * Historic Site ** Futagozuka Kofun - Designated on August 30, 1983 (Showa 58)[http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002346/index.html Designated/Registered Historic Site of Hadano City] (Hadano City Website).. === Hadano City Designated designation1 === * Important designation1 (Tangible designation1) ** Silver-decorated Keito Great Sword Excavated from Futagozuka Kofun and Related Items - A total of 36 burial goods, stored at the Sakuradote Kofun Exhibition Hall. Designated on September 27, 2013 (Heisei 25)[http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002226/index.html Silver-decorated Keito Great Sword Excavated from Futagozuka Kofun and Related Items] (Hadano City Website).: ** 1 Stone Bead ** 3 Glass Beads ** 25 Sue Ware Items ** 1 Haji Ware Item ** 1 Scabbard Fitting ** 1 Earring ** 2 Iron Arrowheads ** 2 Gold-plated Horse Trappings == Related Facilities == * Hadano City Sakuradote Kofun Exhibition Hall (Hadano City, Horiyamashita) - Houses burial goods from Futagozuka Kofun (no permanent exhibition). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources not used directly in this article)}} * {{Cite book|ja|editor=|author=|year=2013|chapter=|title=Hadano's Ruins 5: Kanagawa Prefecture Designated Historic Site Futagozuka Kofun (Hadano City designation1 Research Report 13)|publisher=Hadano City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002233/index.html Futagozuka Kofun], [http://www.city.hadano.kanagawa.jp/www/contents/1001000002226/index.html Silver-decorated Keito Great Sword and Related Items Excavated from Futagozuka Kofun] - Hadano City Website {{translated page|ja|дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі (з§ҰйҮҺеёӮ)|version=99995706|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі (з§ҰйҮҺеёӮ)]] [[zh:дәҢеӯҗеЎҡеҸӨеўі]] {{wikidata link|Q44705270}} [[Category:Designated historic sites of Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kanagawa prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Hadano]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
